meaning: n.秘密会议,[天主教]教皇选举会议,红衣主教团
examples: There are now 117 cardinals who can be cardinal electors, that is, eligible to enter the secret conclave that will choose the next pope.
You heard the reaction in the conclave.
I'm ashamed to say that the master told me the marshal would defeat you in the conclave.
The Conclave is very much a struggle for the institutional heart of the Church.
Once the process begins, the cardinals aren't allowed to talk with anyone outside of the conclave.
